steps.title: Move from general to exact
steps.content: The first two sentences give a general description of the offshore wind project and its location. The next sentence gives precise details: 176 turbines at a site 27 miles east of Cape Charles.

steps.title: Reject other relationships
steps.content: B signals a conclusion, C signals a result, and D signals contrast. The needed transition introduces exact details that specify the previous general description. The answer is A.
